caption:
You know what you spent on ads last month.

Do you know what it paid you back?

The Ad ROI Calculator takes your ad spend, lead count, and close rate and returns one number: revenue per dollar spent.

No spreadsheet. No guessing before your next budget call.

It's one of five free tools on the Black Arrow tools page. No signup, no card, just your numbers.

DM TOOLS

#paidadvertising #leadgeneration #smallbusinessmarketing #serviceindustry #speedtolead
rationale: Offers/Lead Magnets is under-served this cycle, and the Ad ROI Calculator is the one published free tool this account hasn't solo-featured yet, using the image-promo format that converts fastest for a single clear offer.
